name: fast-folder
title: Fast Folder Access
description: Quickly access frequently used folders with intelligent search and history
author: naotone

commands.name: search-folders
commands.title: Search Folders
commands.description: Search and access folders with smart history-based suggestions

preferences.name: searchPaths
preferences.title: Search Directories
preferences.description: Directories to search for folders, separated by commas (default: home directory)

preferences.name: maxHistoryItems
preferences.title: Max History Items
preferences.description: Maximum number of recent folders to remember

preferences.name: searchDepth
preferences.title: Search Depth
preferences.description: How deep to search in subdirectories

preferences.name: maxResults
preferences.title: Max Search Results
preferences.description: Maximum number of folders to display in search results

preferences.name: debounceDelay
preferences.title: Search Delay
preferences.description: Delay before starting search after typing (milliseconds)

preferences.name: enableFuzzyMatch
preferences.title: Enable Fuzzy Matching
preferences.description: Enable fuzzy search that matches characters in sequence (e.g., 'proj' matches 'project')
preferences.label: Enable fuzzy matching for more flexible search

preferences.name: prioritizeRecent
preferences.title: Prioritize Recent Folders
preferences.description: Give higher scores to recently used folders in search results
preferences.label: Boost recent folders in search rankings

preferences.name: shortcuts
preferences.title: Keyboard Shortcuts Guide
preferences.description:
📋 How to use Fast Folder Access:

🔍 SEARCH:
• Type to search folders dynamically
• Results sorted by relevance score
• Fuzzy matching: 'proj' finds 'project'

⚡ ACTIONS:
• ⏎ Enter: Navigate into folder (browse mode)
• ⌘↵ or ⌘O: Open folder in Finder
• ⌘⌥O: Open folder in Finder without history
• ⌘⇧O: Reveal folder in Finder
• ⌘→: Navigate into folder (browse mode)
• ⌫ or ⌘←: Go back (when in browse mode)
• ⌃R: Add to recent folders
• ⌃X: Remove from recent (recent items only)
• ⌘C: Copy folder path to clipboard

📁 FOLDER TYPES:
• 🕐 Recent: Previously accessed folders
• 🏠 Parent: Configured search directories
• 📂 Search: Found folders matching your query

⚙️ SEARCH SCORING:
• Exact match: 100 points
• Starts with query: 90 points
• Word boundary match: 80 points
• Contains query: 70 points
• Fuzzy match: 50-60 points
• Recent bonus: +20 points
• Depth penalty: -5 points per level
preferences.placeholder: This field shows keyboard shortcuts and usage instructions
